allow: PowerShell(gh api repos/jerosoler/Drawflow --jq '{description, stargazers_count, forks_count, open_issues_count, license: .license.spdx_id, default_branch, pushed_at, updated_at, size}')

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/repos/jerosoler/Drawflow' -Headers @{'User-Agent'='claude'}; $r | Select-Object description, stargazers_count, forks_count, open_issues_count, default_branch, pushed_at, updated_at, size, @{n='license';e={$_.license.spdx_id}} | Format-List)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jerosoler/Drawflow/master/README.md' -Headers @{'User-Agent'='claude'}; $r | Out-File -FilePath C:\\Users\\rizhi\\Desktop\\GROK\\public\\.claude\\drawflow-readme.md -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "saved length: $\($r.Length\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jerosoler/Drawflow/master/src/drawflow.js' -Headers @{'User-Agent'='claude'}; $r | Out-File -FilePath C:\\Users\\rizhi\\Desktop\\GROK\\public\\.claude\\drawflow-src.js -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "saved length: $\($r.Length\)")
PowerShell(gh api repos/xyflow/xyflow --jq '{name, license: .license.spdx_id, stars: .stargazers_count, pushed_at: .pushed_at, archived: .archived, description: .description}')

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://registry.npmjs.org/drawflow' -Headers @{'User-Agent'='claude'}; $latest = $r.'dist-tags'.latest; $v = $r.versions.$latest; Write-Output "latest=$latest"; Write-Output "license=$\($v.license\)"; Write-Output "main=$\($v.main\)"; Write-Output "types=$\($v.types\)$\($v.typings\)"; Write-Output "deps=$\($v.dependencies | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; Write-Output "modified=$\($r.time.modified\)"; Write-Output "published_latest=$\($r.time.$latest\)"; Write-Output "tarball=$\($v.dist.tarball\)"; Write-Output "unpackedSize=$\($v.dist.unpackedSize\)"; Write-Output "fileCount=$\($v.dist.fileCount\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/xyflow/xyflow" -Headers @{Accept="application/vnd.github+json"}; "$\($r.name\) | license=$\($r.license.spdx_id\) | stars=$\($r.stargazers_count\) | pushed=$\($r.pushed_at\) | archived=$\($r.archived\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/search/issues?q=repo:jerosoler/Drawflow+typed+connection&per_page=10' -Headers @{'User-Agent'='claude'}; $r.items | Select-Object number, title, state | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/search/issues?q=repo:jerosoler/Drawflow+validation&per_page=10' -Headers @{'User-Agent'='claude'}; $r.items | Select-Object number, title, state | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/search/issues?q=repo:jerosoler/Drawflow+performance&per_page=10' -Headers @{'User-Agent'='claude'}; $r2.items | Select-Object number, title, state | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($repos = @\("xyflow/xyflow","retejs/rete","clientIO/joint","visjs/vis-network","maxGraph/maxGraph","cytoscape/cytoscape.js","jagenjo/litegraph.js","Comfy-Org/litegraph.js","jerosoler/Drawflow"\); foreach \($repo in $repos\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$repo" -Headers @{Accept="application/vnd.github+json"}; "$repo | license=$\($r.license.spdx_id\) | stars=$\($r.stargazers_count\) | pushed=$\($r.pushed_at\) | archived=$\($r.archived\) | desc=$\($r.description\)" } catch { "$repo | ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($repos = @\("xyflow/xyflow","retejs/rete","clientIO/joint","visjs/vis-network","maxGraph/maxGraph","cytoscape/cytoscape.js","jagenjo/litegraph.js","jerosoler/Drawflow"\); foreach \($repo in $repos\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$repo/releases/latest" -Headers @{Accept="application/vnd.github+json"}; "$repo | tag=$\($r.tag_name\) | published=$\($r.published_at\) | name=$\($r.name\)" } catch { "$repo | NO_RELEASE_OR_ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($pkgs = @\("@xyflow/react","reactflow","rete","jointjs","vis-network","@maxgraph/core","cytoscape","litegraph.js","drawflow"\); foreach \($p in $pkgs\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://registry.npmjs.org/$p" -Headers @{Accept="application/json"}; $latest = $r.'dist-tags'.latest; $vmod = $r.versions.$latest; $deps = \($vmod.dependencies.PSObject.Properties.Name\) -join ","; $peer = \($vmod.peerDependencies.PSObject.Properties.Name\) -join ","; "$p | latest=$latest | time=$\($r.time.$latest\) | deps=[$deps] | peer=[$peer]" } catch { "$p | ERROR" } })

PowerShell($pkgs = @\("@xyflow/react","rete","rete-engine","rete-react-plugin","jointjs","vis-network","@maxgraph/core","cytoscape","litegraph.js","drawflow"\); foreach \($p in $pkgs\) { try { $url = "https://bundlephobia.com/api/size?package=$p"; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url; "$p | size=$\($r.size\) bytes \($\([math]::Round\($r.size/1024,1\)\) KB\) | gzip=$\($r.gzip\) bytes \($\([math]::Round\($r.gzip/1024,1\)\) KB\) | deps=$\($r.dependencyCount\)" } catch { "$p | ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=litegraph+typescript+fork:true&sort=stars&order=desc&per_page=10"; $r.items | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.full_name\) | stars=$\($_.stargazers_count\) | pushed=$\($_.pushed_at\) | desc=$\($_.description\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://registry.npmjs.org/@comfyorg/litegraph"; $latest = $r.'dist-tags'.latest; "@comfyorg/litegraph | latest=$latest | time=$\($r.time.$latest\) | desc=$\($r.description\)" } catch { "no comfyorg pkg" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://registry.npmjs.org/litegraph"; $latest = $r.'dist-tags'.latest; "litegraph | latest=$latest | time=$\($r.time.$latest\)" } catch { "" })

PowerShell($searches = @\("Comfy-Org/litegraph_ts","Comfy-Org/litegraph","Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend"\); foreach \($repo in $searches\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$repo" -Headers @{Accept="application/vnd.github+json"}; "$repo | license=$\($r.license.spdx_id\) | stars=$\($r.stargazers_count\) | pushed=$\($r.pushed_at\) | archived=$\($r.archived\) | desc=$\($r.description\)" } catch { "$repo | ERROR" } })
